messages.raw_user_text:
I’ve had a whole abe low carb bagel with 2 slices smoked salmon and a small squirt of olive oil.

Ive been on my feet for yard work and moving boxes all day, and had a 10k lined up for tonight. It might be a good day for pizza or dumplings.
messages.notes: Early accessible log; mentions meal, yard work/moving boxes, planned 10k, possible pizza/dumplings.

messages.raw_user_text: 12k run, which felt good but long! I am also opting for dumplings tonight from Confucius dumplings

I wouldn’t be surprised if it’s a 4000 calorie output day, or close. That run was 100 minutes. The CrossFit workout was a rough one. 800m warm up, then run a mile, then 100 box burpees and 200 overhead squats in partners at 45 kg. Then walk 30-40 minutes for the golf course walk then 3 hours of yardwork and helping move. That was quite a day!
messages.notes: High-output day with long run, CrossFit, walking, yardwork, moving.

messages.raw_user_text: Good. Also, tomorrow I’m going to a music festival, so we will need to strategize. I will want a bit of junk food and a beer!
messages.notes: Planned festival with junk food and beer.

messages.raw_user_text: Dinner was weird. I ate 7 dumplings and then suddenly felt nauseous. Probably from the long run, I suppose.
messages.notes: Dinner plus nausea after high-output day.

messages.raw_user_text: Hey, weighed in at 199.8 this morning!

Next milestone 195!
Brekky: 300-350g turkey mince and scrambled eggs combined, with salsa.

Off to festival.
Festival so far. 1 hot toddy, 1 Dagwood dog and like 3 chicken nuggets.
Festival food. 2 hot toddy, 1 Dagwood dog and like 3 chicken nuggets. Dinner was a Japanese chicken katsu with curry on about 100g of rice and a little veg
messages.notes: Fuller festival food log; likely supersedes previous partial festival update.

messages.raw_user_text:
Another solid hyrox session 
Brekky 2 eggs, 2 slices of salmon and a crumpet. 
Lunch double protein shake and half a peanut butter and honey. 
Snack mussashi protein bar, and a bit of white chocolate. 
Dinner 250g turkey mince, low carb wrap, salsa
messages.notes: HYROX session plus full-day food log.

messages.raw_user_text: I also had a pear and worked on building a shed for six hours
I’m probably going to have popcorn and another protein shake tonight, and pickles. I’m starving and exhausted. It’s a day off from the gym tomorrow.
messages.notes: Evening hunger/fatigue and planned snack/rest day.

messages.raw_user_text:
New day! Hyrox this morning. Brekky 3 eggs, slice of turkey breast, mushrooms and croissant. 
Lunch: chicken leg and thigh, jerk style. Green beans. 125g steak. 
Snack small amount of beef jerky.
messages.notes: New day marker; HYROX and meals.

messages.raw_user_text: I was thinking a low carb wrap with an 80g chunk of salmon and then 2 slices of smoked salmon. Should I add a protein shake?
Worked outside for two and a half hours, then ate 150g salmon + 2 slices smoked salmon on a low carb tortilla. Finished with some pickles.

Weighed in at 199.3 today, so progress is continuing. It seems a bit slow this week…

CrossFit workout
Brekky: 50g of beef jerky
Lunch: cinco de mayo celebration. 10 tortilla chips with a bit of guacamole and salsa. 1 taco with pulled pork. 50g spare rib, 50g chicken breast, 1 cup tortilla soup, 1/2 cup horchata, 1 small empanada. Bit of veg. 
Snack 50g beef jerky
Great! I do think my training volume is a bit up with hyrox prep. I went from 5-6 CrossFit sessions a week to 2 hyrox, 3 CrossFit and 1-2 runs.
That sounds awesome! Dinner was 250g lean hamburger meat, half cup of corn and some pickles

Brekky: 1 biscuit with gravy and 2 eggs. 
Lunch: 125g steak, 85g chicken, about a fist size of watermelon and kiwi. No snacks.
I’m thinking 100g lean hamburger meat, 2 slices smoked salmon, pickles for dinner. Then a shake and popcorn later.
Great. Today was a rest day and tomorrow is a hard training day.
messages.notes: Rest day and next-day training context.

messages.raw_user_text: I was hungry. So i had the dinner I said, but three slices of salmon
I also ended up having the popcorn (half bag) and the protein shake! I’m feeling ready for tomorrow. Hopefully it’s still a deficit day also
Man, the scale has not moved much in the last 7 days. Is that expected?
messages.notes: Accompanied by image of handwritten weight log in conversation.

messages.raw_user_text:
First, daily check in. Then I want to talk about expectations and what I can expect to see over the next few weeks. 

Hard CrossFit this morning
Brekky: 1/2 English muffin, some strawberries, 4 eggs, heap of mushrooms
Lunch: Palm size amount of orange chicken, 1 crumbed fillet barramundi (1.5 palms) and 1.5 cups veggies
messages.notes: Daily check-in with hard CrossFit and meals.

messages.raw_user_text: Is my running load in a good place? I’ve been doing 2 hyrox workouts a week (running under fatigue, shorter runs with stations), one short run (5k, maybe zone 3 or 4) and one long zone 2 (10-12k)

Ok, really chaotic evening. There is an unexpected party being hosted at my house tomorrow morning. We should make a plan. It’s a Mother’s Day brunch, so mimosas and quiche and croissants and fruit are on the menu. I can avoid all of it if I need to. 

Dinner: Abe low carb bagel and three slices of smoked salmon. Still hungry later so two chicken nuggets, 10g cheese and 1 more slice of salmon

Got it. The thing is I’m not a mom, it’s my wife’s event and she kind of got pushed into hosting it. It wasn’t even supposed to be here! So tomorrow is going to be a bit stressful. 😣 I think it will be quite small, so that’s good. It’s just 2 hours.
Got it. A separate question now. How are you estimating my maintenance calories?
Ok. Well, I’m hungry, and I’m having some popcorn too!

What a morning. The brunch is done. 
Brekky: 1/3 Abe low carb bagel, 2 slices smoked salmon
Brunch: 1 mimosa, 1 croissant and a few berries. 
Lunch: starving. 10 scrambled eggs.

What a day. It got much better, but it was still stressful. I worked outside for 2 hours cleaning and doing some shop projects, then went for a 12k run. My watch said a 1000 calories! Anyways, I’m getting my wife and I dumplings for dinner. She had such a stressful day; we’re going to enjoy them on the couch with some tv
It’s also another big hyrox day tomorrow!

I have a thought. The garmin watch doesn’t know that I’m pushing my son in his stroller. It’s very cool, I pack him a dinner and put a movie on a tablet and then run while pushing him wrapped up in a blanket for 1-2 hours. Everyone loves it! But it’s really noticeably harder. Zone 2 is like 10-11 minutes per mile like that.
messages.notes: Stroller run context; affects perceived effort/TDEE.

messages.raw_user_text: I did forget to mention I stole three of his gummy worms at the mid point of the run. A little candy goes a long way in these long runs! 😂
Just for record keeping: I had 9 boiled dumplings, 1 fried gyoza, and a cup of rice and sweet and sour fried pork.
Just out of curiosity, let’s see if we can estimate the pork and rice better. It was a cup of rice and pork combined. Here is a picture.
I actually weighed in lower this morning! 199.7. That’s a nice morale boost. Solid hyrox this morning, about 40 minutes with no rest, and planning to take family out to breakfast for Mother’s Day.

I’m a little concerned I’m not resting enough. I had one day off this week, and at 33 years old I really feel it. I’m still enjoying workouts, but I start thinking about rest days really hard. I think I run a sleep deficit pretty often and then catch up on off days. I don’t really track sleep formally.
messages.notes: Recovery concern and sleep deficit pattern.

messages.raw_user_text: Ok, ended up making breakfast for the family! 80g salmon fillet, 3-4 scrambled eggs and a small croissant, and coffee with a splash of oat milk
Running entry for today, 1.5 serve protein shake and apple

Ok, lots of parenting and a couple hours in the wood shop. Dinner was 110g salmon fillets (air fryer), a small bit of rice (I just didn’t like the packaged rice…) and 1 cup mixed peas and corn. Also 5 fried pickle chips (about the size of a us quarter). 

I’m STARVING still. I think more water, a protein shake, popcorn and pickles probably. But let’s look at the numbers and see if this is a reasonable hunger or if I’m out of sorts.
messages.notes: Parenting/woodshop activity; dinner and hunger analysis request.

messages.raw_user_text: Did you get two salmon fillets in there? So total 220g of salmon.

Ok. Good. Honestly, I’m a bit confused about those salmon serving sizes. They are frozen fillets with skin on, and it says they are 125g, and then I take the skin off. They do not look like 125g to me, they are about a palm size. What do you think?
Got it. Ok, I’m going to have the protein shake and I’ll decide on the popcorn later.

Brekky: 4 scrambled eggs and mushrooms
Snack: 25g beef jerky
Lunch: two slices of turkey breast. About 1.5 palms each, and maybe 2-3mm thick. 1 cup Carrots and pumpkin, and 1 burger patty.
Great. I took a rest day, so I’m a bit less hungry.
For dinner, a 150g porterhouse some mushrooms and a little Scotch has me excited. How’s that fit in.

Moderate hyrox workout today, with heavy back squats and a 20 minute circuit. Some of my team mates were talking and it got me thinking. I’m fairly muscular, but I kind of want a visible bicep vein! How does one get one?
messages.notes: Moderate HYROX plus aesthetic/body composition goal.

messages.raw_user_text: Cool! I have visible forearm veins and a slightly visible chest and front felt veins. Low 190s is not too far away!
messages.notes: Body composition observation; likely meant front delt veins.

messages.raw_user_text:
Brekky: 1.5 fists of scrambled eggs (maybe 3 eggs?), slice of ham, 1 tsp guacamole, mushrooms. Banana. 

Lunch: hamburger patty, 90g chicken breast, 1 cup fruit.
